title: API Fiddle Specification
description: An API specification within an API Fiddle project, representing an OpenAPI document being designed or edited.

description.description: A detailed description of the specification.

format.description: The OpenAPI format version used by this specification.

content.description: The raw specification content in YAML or JSON.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the specification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the specification was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the specification was last updated.
